vkSj lans; gksxk% Vksy Iyktk ¼Iyktkvksa½ dk voLFkku ¼fMtkbu pSust½ ckbikl dh yEckbZ ¼fd-eh- esa½ vkSj ykxr ¼djksM+ #i, esaa½ ftlds fy, vfrfjDr 'kqYd lans; gS yEckbZ ykxr fpRrwj ftys ¼vka/kzizns’k½ esa xkao ,l-oh- iqje ds ikl jkjk&205 dk 305-800 fd-eh- ¼fo|eku pSust 309-300 fd-eh-½ 18-800 fd-eh- ¼fr#ifr ckbikl½ 274-800 fd-eh- ls 293-600 fd-eh- rd ¼fMtkbu pSust½ 98-90 djksM+ #i, [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@636@11&12@lhvks@thlh psUubZ ¼274-8&341-60 vkSj 0-00&59-60½chvksVh] vyds’k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th December, 2014 S.O. 3321(E).—Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide G.S.R. 838 (E) dated 05.12.2008, the Central Government, vide notification S.O. 2776 (E) dated 28.10.2014, authorized M/s Transstroy Tirupati- Tiruthani – Chennai Tollways Private Limited to collect and retain the fee for the development of Tirupati - Tiruthani -Chennai section from km. 274.800 to km 341.600 (design chainage km 274.800 to km 338.030) on National Highway No. 205 in the State of Andhra Pradesh and km. 0.000 to km 59.600 (design chainage km 0.000 to km 61.470) on National Highway No. 205 in the State of Tamil Nadu to two/four lane divided carriageway with paved shoulders and operation and maintenance of the said section on Design, Build, Finance, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT) basis. Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules 2008, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification published vide S.O. 2776 (E) dated 28.10.2014. The para 2 of notes shall be substituted as follows: “2. In addition to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the case of the following 1 (one) bypass, cost of which is specified hereunder, at the following Toll Plaza, at the base rates mentioned in Table-2 above: Location of Toll Plaza(s) (Design Chainage) Length (in km) and Cost of bypass (Rupees in Crore) for which additional fee is payable Length Cost At km 305.800 (Existing Chainage km 309.300) of NH-205 near Village S.V. Puram in Chittoor District (Andhra Pradesh) 18.800 km (Tirupati Bypass) from km 274.800 to km 293.600 (Design Chainage) Rs. 98.90 Crore [F. No NHAI/13013/636/11-12/CO/GC Chennai (274.8-341.60 & 0.00-59.60) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
